mapper.select:
/* SQL ID : ExamQstnDAO.randomQstnList 설 명 : 랜덤 문제 리스트 조회 */ SELECT A.EXAM_ID AS examCd , A.EXAM_QSTN_NO AS examQstnSn , A.QSTN_SEQNO AS qstnNo , A.CNDDT_ID AS subNo , A.TTL AS TTL , A.QSTN_CTS AS qstnCts , A.EXMPL01 AS empl1 , A.EXMPL02 AS empl2 , A.EXMPL03 AS empl3 , A.EXMPL04 AS empl4 , A.EXMPL05 AS empl5 , A.EXMPL06 AS empl6 , A.EXMPL07 AS empl7 , A.EXMPL08 AS empl8 , A.EXMPL09 AS empl9 , A.EXMPL10 AS empl10 , A.MLT_CRANSYN AS multiRgtChoiceYn , A.MLT_CRANS_TYCD AS multiRgtChoiceTypeCd , A.MLT_CRANS AS multiRgtAnsr , A.RGT_ANSR1 AS rgtAnsr1 , A.RGT_ANSR2 AS rgtAnsr2 , A.RGT_ANSR3 AS rgtAnsr3 , A.CRANS4 AS rgtAnsr4 , A.CRANS5 AS rgtAnsr5 , A.QSTN_EXPLN AS qstnExpl , A.QSTN_TYCD AS qstnTypeCd , (SELECT MAX(CDNM) FROM TB_ORG_CODE WHERE CTGRCD = 'QSTN_TYCD' AND CD = A.QSTN_TYCD) AS qstnTypeNm , A.QSTN_SCR AS qstnScore , A.QSTN_DFCTLV AS qstnDiff , A.WHOL_CRANS_PROCYN AS errorAnsrYn , A.EDTRYN AS editorYn , A.DELYN AS delYn , A.RGTR_ID AS rgtrId , A.FRST_INQ_DTTM AS regDttm , A.MDFR_ID AS mdfrId , A.MOD_DTTM AS modDttm ,(case when (NVL(length(trim(A.EXMPL01)),0) = 0) then 0 else 1 end + case when (NVL(length(trim(A.EXMPL02)),0) = 0) then 0 else 1 end + case when (NVL(length(trim(A.EXMPL03)),0) = 0) then 0 else 1 end + case when (NVL(length(trim(A.EXMPL04)),0) = 0) then 0 else 1 end + case when (NVL(length(trim(A.EXMPL05)),0) = 0) then 0 else 1 end + case when (NVL(length(trim(A.EXMPL06)),0) = 0) then 0 else 1 end + case when (NVL(length(trim(A.EXMPL07)),0) = 0) then 0 else 1 end + case when (NVL(length(trim(A.EXMPL08)),0) = 0) then 0 else 1 end + case when (NVL(length(trim(A.EXMPL09)),0) = 0) then 0 else 1 end + case when (NVL(length(trim(A.EXMPL10)),0) = 0) then 0 else 1 end ) AS emplCnt FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_QSTN A JOIN ( SELECT
B.EXAM_ID || '_' || B.QSTN_SEQNO || '_' || FLOOR( MIN(B.CNDDT_ID) + DBMS_RANDOM.VALUE * (MAX(B.CNDDT_ID) - MIN(B.CNDDT_ID) + 1) ) AS examQstn FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_QSTN B WHERE 1=1 AND B.EXAM_ID = #{examCd} AND B.DELYN = 'N' GROUP BY B.EXAM_ID, B.QSTN_SEQNO ) B ON A.EXAM_ID || '_' || A.QSTN_SEQNO || '_' || A.CNDDT_ID = B.examQstn WHERE A.DELYN = 'N' ORDER BY A.QSTN_SEQNO, A.CNDDT_ID

/* SQL ID : ExamQstnDAO.seqQstnList 설 명 : 순차 문제 리스트 조회 */ SELECT A.EXAM_ID AS examCd , A.EXAM_QSTN_NO AS examQstnSn , A.QSTN_SEQNO AS qstnNo , A.CNDDT_ID AS subNo , A.TTL AS TTL , A.QSTN_CTS AS qstnCts , A.EXMPL01 AS empl1 , A.EXMPL02 AS empl2 , A.EXMPL03 AS empl3 , A.EXMPL04 AS empl4 , A.EXMPL05 AS empl5 , A.EXMPL06 AS empl6 , A.EXMPL07 AS empl7 , A.EXMPL08 AS empl8 , A.EXMPL09 AS empl9 , A.EXMPL10 AS empl10 , A.MLT_CRANSYN AS multiRgtChoiceYn , A.MLT_CRANS_TYCD AS multiRgtChoiceTypeCd , A.MLT_CRANS AS multiRgtAnsr , A.RGT_ANSR1 AS rgtAnsr1 , A.RGT_ANSR2 AS rgtAnsr2 , A.RGT_ANSR3 AS rgtAnsr3 , A.CRANS4 AS rgtAnsr4 , A.CRANS5 AS rgtAnsr5 , A.QSTN_EXPLN AS qstnExpl , A.QSTN_TYCD AS qstnTypeCd , (SELECT MAX(CDNM) FROM TB_ORG_CODE WHERE CTGRCD = 'QSTN_TYCD' AND CD = A.QSTN_TYCD) AS qstnTypeNm , A.QSTN_SCR AS qstnScore , A.QSTN_DFCTLV AS qstnDiff , A.WHOL_CRANS_PROCYN AS errorAnsrYn , A.EDTRYN AS editorYn , A.DELYN AS delYn , A.RGTR_ID AS rgtrId , A.FRST_INQ_DTTM AS regDttm , A.MDFR_ID AS mdfrId , A.MOD_DTTM AS modDttm ,(case when (NVL(length(trim(A.EXMPL01)),0) = 0) then 0 else 1 end + case when (NVL(length(trim(A.EXMPL02)),0) = 0) then 0 else 1 end + case when (NVL(length(trim(A.EXMPL03)),0) = 0) then 0 else 1 end + case when (NVL(length(trim(A.EXMPL04)),0) = 0) then 0 else 1 end + case when (NVL(length(trim(A.EXMPL05)),0) = 0) then 0 else 1 end + case when (NVL(length(trim(A.EXMPL06)),0) = 0) then 0 else 1 end + case when (NVL(length(trim(A.EXMPL07)),0) = 0) then 0 else 1 end + case when (NVL(length(trim(A.EXMPL08)),0) = 0) then 0 else 1 end + case when (NVL(length(trim(A.EXMPL09)),0) = 0) then 0 else 1 end + case when (NVL(length(trim(A.EXMPL10)),0) = 0) then 0 else 1 end ) AS emplCnt FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_QSTN A WHERE 1=1 AND A.EXAM_ID = #{examCd} AND A.DELYN = 'N' AND A.CNDDT_ID = 1
ORDER BY A.QSTN_SEQNO, A.CNDDT_ID
/* SQL ID : ExamQstnDAO.qstnCount 설 명 : 문제 개수 조회 */ SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT QSTN_SEQNO FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_QSTN WHERE EXAM_ID = #{examCd} AND DELYN = 'N' ) A

/* SQL ID : ExamQstnDAO.select 설 명 : 문제 조회 */ SELECT A.EXAM_ID AS examCd , A.EXAM_QSTN_NO AS examQstnSn , A.QSTN_SEQNO AS qstnNo , A.CNDDT_ID AS subNo , A.TTL AS TTL , A.QSTN_CTS AS qstnCts , A.EXMPL01 AS empl1 , A.EXMPL02 AS empl2 , A.EXMPL03 AS empl3 , A.EXMPL04 AS empl4 , A.EXMPL05 AS empl5 , A.EXMPL06 AS empl6 , A.EXMPL07 AS empl7 , A.EXMPL08 AS empl8 , A.EXMPL09 AS empl9 , A.EXMPL10 AS empl10 , A.MLT_CRANSYN AS multiRgtChoiceYn , A.MLT_CRANS_TYCD AS multiRgtChoiceTypeCd , A.MLT_CRANS AS multiRgtAnsr , A.RGT_ANSR1 AS rgtAnsr1 , A.RGT_ANSR2 AS rgtAnsr2 , A.RGT_ANSR3 AS rgtAnsr3 , A.CRANS4 AS rgtAnsr4 , A.CRANS5 AS rgtAnsr5 , A.QSTN_EXPLN AS qstnExpl , A.QSTN_TYCD AS qstnTypeCd , A.QSTN_SCR AS qstnScore , A.QSTN_DFCTLV AS qstnDiff , A.WHOL_CRANS_PROCYN AS errorAnsrYn , A.EDTRYN AS editorYn , A.RGTR_ID AS rgtrId , A.FRST_INQ_DTTM AS regDttm , A.MDFR_ID AS mdfrId , A.MOD_DTTM AS modDttm , (case when (IFNULL(length(trim(A.EXMPL01)),0) = 0) then 0 else 1 end +case when (IFNULL(length(trim(A.EXMPL02)),0) = 0) then 0 else 1 end +case when (IFNULL(length(trim(A.EXMPL03)),0) = 0) then 0 else 1 end +case when (IFNULL(length(trim(A.EXMPL04)),0) = 0) then 0 else 1 end +case when (IFNULL(length(trim(A.EXMPL05)),0) = 0) then 0 else 1 end +case when (IFNULL(length(trim(A.EXMPL06)),0) = 0) then 0 else 1 end +case when (IFNULL(length(trim(A.EXMPL07)),0) = 0) then 0 else 1 end +case when (IFNULL(length(trim(A.EXMPL08)),0) = 0) then 0 else 1 end +case when (IFNULL(length(trim(A.EXMPL09)),0) = 0) then 0 else 1 end +case when (IFNULL(length(trim(A.EXMPL10)),0) = 0) then 0 else 1 end ) AS emplCnt FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_QSTN A WHERE A.EXAM_ID = #{examCd}
AND A.EXAM_QSTN_NO = #{examQstnSn}

/* SQL ID : ExamQstnDAO.egovSelect 설 명 : 문제 조회 */ SELECT A.EXAM_ID AS examCd , A.EXAM_QSTN_NO AS examQstnSn , A.QSTN_SEQNO AS qstnNo , A.CNDDT_ID AS subNo , A.TTL AS TTL , A.QSTN_CTS AS qstnCts , A.EXMPL01 AS empl1 , A.EXMPL02 AS empl2 , A.EXMPL03 AS empl3 , A.EXMPL04 AS empl4 , A.EXMPL05 AS empl5 , A.EXMPL06 AS empl6 , A.EXMPL07 AS empl7 , A.EXMPL08 AS empl8 , A.EXMPL09 AS empl9 , A.EXMPL10 AS empl10 , A.MLT_CRANSYN AS multiRgtChoiceYn , A.MLT_CRANS_TYCD AS multiRgtChoiceTypeCd , A.MLT_CRANS AS multiRgtAnsr , A.RGT_ANSR1 AS rgtAnsr1 , A.RGT_ANSR2 AS rgtAnsr2 , A.RGT_ANSR3 AS rgtAnsr3 , A.CRANS4 AS rgtAnsr4 , A.CRANS5 AS rgtAnsr5 , A.QSTN_EXPLN AS qstnExpl , A.QSTN_TYCD AS qstnTypeCd , (SELECT CDNM FROM TB_ORG_CODE WHERE CTGRCD = 'QSTN_TYCD' AND CD = A.QSTN_TYCD limit 1) AS qstnTypeNm , A.QSTN_SCR AS qstnScore , A.QSTN_DFCTLV AS qstnDiff , A.WHOL_CRANS_PROCYN AS errorAnsrYn , A.EDTRYN AS editorYn , A.RGTR_ID AS rgtrId , A.FRST_INQ_DTTM AS regDttm , A.MDFR_ID AS mdfrId , A.MOD_DTTM AS modDttm , (case when (IFNULL(length(trim(A.EXMPL01)),0) = 0) then 0 else 1 end +case when (IFNULL(length(trim(A.EXMPL02)),0) = 0) then 0 else 1 end +case when (IFNULL(length(trim(A.EXMPL03)),0) = 0) then 0 else 1 end +case when (IFNULL(length(trim(A.EXMPL04)),0) = 0) then 0 else 1 end +case when (IFNULL(length(trim(A.EXMPL05)),0) = 0) then 0 else 1 end +case when (IFNULL(length(trim(A.EXMPL06)),0) = 0) then 0 else 1 end +case when (IFNULL(length(trim(A.EXMPL07)),0) = 0) then 0 else 1 end +case when (IFNULL(length(trim(A.EXMPL08)),0) = 0) then 0 else 1 end +case when (IFNULL(length(trim(A.EXMPL09)),0) = 0) then 0 else 1 end +case when (IFNULL(length(trim(A.EXMPL10)),0) = 0) then 0 else 1 end ) AS emplCnt FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_QSTN A WHERE A.EXAM_ID = #{examCd}
AND A.EXAM_QSTN_NO = #{examQstnSn}
/* SQL ID : ExamQstnDAO.selectKey 설 명 : 문항 키 생성 */ SELECT NVL(MAX(EXAM_QSTN_NO), 0) + 1 FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_QSTN
